raw_text: about me aeronautical engineer graduated in 2021 from universidad pontificia bolivariana in colombia. since graduation, have been working in logistics administration in mercadona s.a, gaining experience in supply chain management, inventory control, and process optimization. my engineering background has allowed me to apply analytical and problem-solving skills to improve operational efficiency. am highly organized, responsible, and interested in continuing my academic and professional development, particularly in areas that combine engineering, logistics, and management. languages spanish - c1 english - b2 catalan - c1 contact % 640 095 320 es juanfcavel@gmail.com q rubi, bcn juan felipe catao velásquez education aeronautical engineering universidad pontificia bolivariana med, colombia 2016 - 2021 e structures team member aiaa design/build/fly (dbf) competition 2019. participated in the structural design and analysis of an unmanned aircraft. focused on weight optimization and structural integrity using cad and fem tools. gained experience in collaborative engineering and technical communication. e team leader rc gas helicopter restoration project 2018. led a multidisciplinary student team in the full restoration of a gasoline- powered remote-controlled helicopter. responsibilities included team coordination, task assignment, mechanical repairs, system testing, and safety management. developed strong leadership and project management skills. work experience powerplant engineering intern airline grupo viva air med colombia e performed time control processes for engine preservation monitoring to ensure compliance with maintenance schedules. e created engineering orders for the execution of technical tasks and corrective actions. e prepared oil consumption reports for audit and regulatory purposes. e reviewed fan blade mapping to support inspection procedures and engine performance tracking. e = analyzed airworthiness directives (ads) and service bulletins (sb) to assess applicability and ensure regulatory compliance. jun - dec 2020 this role allowed me to apply technical knowledge in real operational contexts, improved my attention to detail, and deepened my understanding of engine maintenance and airworthiness standards. logistics administration assistant mercadona s.a bcn spain may 2021 - may 2025 coordinated supply chain activities, including inventory control, order processing, and supplier communication. managed logistical documentation for shipments, ensuring compliance with internal and external requirements. collaborated with other departments to solve logistical issues and improve workflow efficiency. this position helped me develop strong organizational and analytical skills, as well as a clear understanding of resource management and operational planningkey elements for working in complex engineering environments. recommendation letter from: phd. candidate esteban morales aguirre to: admissions committee subject: recommendation for juan felipe catao dear admissions committee, itis a great pleasure for me to write this letter of recommendation for juan felipe catao, with whom studied aeronautical engineering. we worked together on several academic projects, and can confidently say that he is one of the most dedicated and talented students had the chance to collaborate with. one of the most remarkable projects we shared was the restoration of a gasoline- powered rc helicopter, where juan felipe served as team leader. he showed excellent leadership and technical skills, organizing tasks, solving challenges with creativity, and making sure the team worked efficiently. his commitment and ability to manage both the technical and human aspects of the project were key to its success. juan felipe also contributed actively to the design/build/fly (dbf) competition as part of the structures section. his work was always precise and well-planned, and he demonstrated a solid understanding of structural analysis and teamwork in high-pressure environments. apart from his academic strengths, juan felipe is a respectful, collaborative, and reliable person. he always supported his classmates, shared his knowledge openly, and showed a strong willingness to learn and grow. am confident that juan felipe catao will be an excellent addition to the masters program in aircraft systems integration. he has the academic preparation, hands-on experience, and motivation to make a valuable contribution to your institution and the aerospace industry. please feel free to contact me if you require any additional information. sincerely, llar> esteban morales aguirre esteban.morales-aguirre @tesa.prd.fr +33 610583393
